Nobody knows how she got onto Bermuda, except that she was here before everyone else. Extremely good at adapting to the environment, she is like a chameleon that survives and thrives.
NONE
NONE
NONE
Chief nurse of a renowned hospital.
Kelly is an athlete, a sprinter.
Nikita works as a professional bodyguard.
Misha is an extremely talented racer.
Paloma is the reigning arms queen of the underworld.
A schoolgirl from an extremely wealthy family.
Moco is an outstanding hacker.
Laura is an outstanding special agent.
A124 is a robot made with modern technology.
Shani is an engineer who works at a junkyard.
Kelly's potential is unlocked for use.
Notora is a tomboyish motorcycle gang member.
Steffie is a pro graffiti artist.
Kapella is a popular pop singer and star.
Clu is a modern day private detective.
Dasha is a prankster and rebel.
Snowelle is a nanotech engineer.
Xayne is an extreme sports athlete.
Moco "Enigma" knows what she has to do.
A-Patroa is an owner of a music shop, which doubles as a safe haven for the local community. She uses her music to rehabilitate people.
Iris is a deaf, tech-modded assassin who had a large hand in shaping the city she lives in.
Luna is the spark plug and an extremely capable leader of the Guild.
Sonia is a genetically modified nanoscientist with exceptional intelligence and expertise in nanobiotechnology.
Suzy is a formidable bounty assassin who is kind at heart. She has a soft spot for orphans and is willing to continue her profession to prevent them from having a similar childhood as hers.
A paranoid, eccentric neuroscientist who walks the line between good and evil. She is obsessed with electroshock therapies and follows her own set of rules.

A cool, spry girl from the city of La Luna with excellent parkour skills and a playful nature. She likes to work with Mr. Waggor, outsmarting their foes together with clever pranks and innovative Gloo inventions.

Nobody knows how he got onto Bermuda, except that he was here before everyone else. Extremely good at adapting to the environment, he is like a chameleon that survives and thrives.
Andrew was once a police officer.
Ford is trained at sea and extremely tough.
Maxim is a competitive eater.
Kla is a renowned Muay Thai practitioner.
Miguel is the commander of a section in the special forces.
Antonio was an orphan who grew up to be a gangster.
Monkey King is Here!
Hayato is a legendary Samurai
Rafael is a deadly killer.
Joseph is a well-known physicist, but he is also a player.
Alok is a world famous DJ, ready to drop a beat.
Alvaro is a wild but skilled demolitionist.
Jota is a parkour expert and stuntman.
Luqueta is an up and rising soccer star.
Wolfrahh is a game streamer and esport player.
Something has awakened inside Hayato.
Jai is a decorated SWAT commander.
K is a professor and jiu-jitsu expert.
Sverr is a top-tier MMA fighter.
Chrono is a bounty hunter from another universe.
Skyler is a CEO and superstar.
Shirou is the fastest delivery guy around.
Andrew "the Fierce" is a man on a mission.
Maro is a professional falconer.
D-bee is a music maker and streetdancer.
Thiva is a rising singer-musician star.
Dimitri is a world renowned sound technology engineer.
Leon is a rising star in the basketball scene.
Otho is a memory tech engineer at a polytech university.
Nairi is a storm chaser who researches about climate technology.
Thala is a man full of motivation despite having grown up under challenging circumstances. He achieved success through sheer hard work and is now determined to help others find their light.
Kenta is Hayato's bodyguard and a skilled weaponsmith.
Homer is a blind assassin whose other senses more than make up for his lost one.
J.Biebs is a singer who dedicates his life and uses his singing to reunite the world.
Tatsuya is a hothead who is willing to trust to make his city a better place.
Santino Valentine is a fashion designer, who is always a trending subject in the fashion world and on social media.
Orion is a former mercenary who underwent a biological transformation and obtained a formidable power.
Alvaro "Firebrand" is a wild but skilled demolitionist.
Awakened Alok illuminates the world with music and color.
Ignis is a superpowered teenager who was born with the ability to "ignite". Although sometimes his power causes even bigger problems, he still steps up to fight crime and uphold justice.

A 16-year-old genius inventor with knowledge beyond his age. Once a little boy who sought refuge under the protection of his sister, Suzy, he now bravely stands on the battlefield with his inventions.
A former soldier of the Special Forces. His fate took a sharp turn when encountering a mysterious energy source, which transformed his body and instilled a constant craving for more energy.

Born in the arctic region, Koda was once led by a snow fox to find a mask embedded with advanced tech of his village. The nature-loving boy has longed for an adventure in the outside world. As he met Wolfrahh while playing games online and, later on, Leon and his sister, Koda began to explore what is beyond the familiar.
A brilliant, even slightly overachieving student by day and a beloved vigilante by night. With his flashy physical prowess, Oscar leaps through the shadows to take down the evil.
